codeReview.summary: Routing/sidebar wiring and the Actions page UI are implemented, but the required component-level verification is missing: the added test file does not render or exercise the actual ActionsPage component, so VAL-UI-014 is not met.

issues.description: The test suite is explicitly node/no-DOM and tests local helper functions rather than the component. It never imports or renders ActionsPage (no render/screen usage), so required component behaviors (rendering cards, tab interactions, dismiss/snooze UI interactions) are not actually validated.
ActionCardSkeleton is defined but never rendered, so the feature description's loading skeleton state is not reachable in the current UI.

sharedStateObservations.observation: frontend-worker skill procedure requires manual verification with agent-browser, but this worker session performed no agent-browser step while still reporting followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md:53-57 requires agent-browser verification; worker transcript for session 542acc2f-a777-4187-b673-d8923df88373 contains no 'agent-browser' usage; handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Validation expects component tests for Actions Page UI, but the project test setup is node-only and lacks React DOM testing tooling, which encourages logic-only tests and leaves UI acceptance under-validated.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: validation-contract.md VAL-UI-014 requires Actions Page component tests; vitest.config.ts:6 sets environment='node'; package.json has no @testing-library/react dependency (dependency key checks returned False for both dependencies and devDependencies).

summary: Feature implementation is close on UI wiring, but review fails due to missing component-level test coverage for the Actions page (blocking). Also noted a non-blocking gap: skeleton loading UI is defined but not used.
